Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 5, 2026

This Privacy Policy describes how Digital Factory ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, and shares information when you visit https://digitalfactory.webhostya.com (the "Site"). By using the Site, you agree to the practices described in this policy.

1. Information We Collect

Information you provide

We do not require you to create an account or submit personal information to read content on this Site. If you contact us by email, we collect the email address and any information you include in your message.

Information collected automatically

When you visit the Site, standard web server logs may record your IP address, browser type, referring URL, pages visited, and the date and time of your visit. This data is used solely for operating and improving the Site and is not sold or shared with third parties for marketing purposes.

Cookies and local storage

The Site uses browser localStorage to remember your display preference (light or dark mode). No tracking cookies are set by this Site. Third-party services embedded on the Site (see Section 3) may set their own cookies subject to their own privacy policies.

2. How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to:

  • Deliver and maintain the Site
  • Understand how visitors use the Site in aggregate, to improve content and performance
  • Respond to emails or enquiries you send us
  • Comply with legal obligations

We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to any third party.

3. Third-Party Services

Gumroad

Some articles link to products sold through Gumroad (gumroad.com). When you click a Gumroad link and make a purchase, you are subject to Gumroad's own Privacy Policy and Terms of Service. We do not receive or store your payment information.

Cloudflare

This Site is hosted on Cloudflare Pages. Cloudflare may process request data (such as IP addresses) as part of its infrastructure and security services. Please review Cloudflare's Privacy Policy for details.

RSS Feed

We offer an RSS feed at /rss.xml. RSS reader applications may collect usage data according to their own privacy policies. We do not collect information about RSS subscribers.

4. Data Retention

Server log data, if retained, is kept for no longer than 90 days and used only for security and operational purposes. Email correspondence is retained only as long as necessary to resolve your enquiry.

5. Children's Privacy

This Site is not directed to children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us and we will delete it promptly.

6. Your Rights

Depending on your location, you may have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of any personal data we hold about you. To exercise these rights, contact us at the email address below. We will respond within 30 days.

7. Links to Other Sites

The Site contains links to external websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of those sites. We encourage you to review the privacy policy of any site you visit.

8. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we do, we will revise the "Last updated" date at the top of this page. Continued use of the Site after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.

9. Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
Email: privacy@digitalfactory.webhostya.com

⚡ Digital Factory

Practical guides, prompt packs, and digital tools for the modern creator.
